Garnet Medallion Amulet

For the duration of the battle, the amulet's wearer and all allied units in a large radius around take 30% less damage.

Once in a while, the unit makes self and 2 allied units with the lowest current health immune to negative effects for 5 sec., and grants shields to the targets. The shields block 1000000 damage of any type and exist for 5 sec. When the shield expires or is removed, the unit that had the shield restores 750000 health to self and all allied units in a small radius around.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 10 secs
